product: 山海经原典地图研究台
updater: Signed multi-source updater + GitHub data publishing
data_publish: GitHub submissions/pending via local authenticated Git
hierarchy_fix: v0.5.3 region overview and local bounds
relation_line_fix: v0.5.4 stable pan, viewport clipping, offscreen targets and relation cache
relation_network: v0.6.0 compact/full modes, directional bundling, offscreen aggregation and hover labels
ux_bundle: v0.6.0 object focus, research/display view, image manager and delete impact preview
relation_interaction: v0.6.1 click-to-explain cards, wider hit areas, edge routing and persistent relation focus
toolbar_ux: v0.6.1 responsive groups, More menu, delayed help tips and collapsible legend
visual_theme: v0.7.5 地块详细页每行固定三等分，三类铺满整行，超出自动换行
environment_layer: v0.7.4 existing saved dossier entries are re-resolved at display time using exact name, canonical alias and matching object category
river_guidance: all 79 existing water paths use muted ink-water rendering in overview and gradually return to functional lines while zooming in
performance: startup database read has an 8-second watchdog; SQLite busy timeout is 3 seconds; main script retries once; map falls back to local cache instead of remaining blank
asset_bundle: v0.7.4 Markdown fields remain the card source; alias-bound objects only provide image, object ID and jump behavior
brush_trace_fix: upper overlay canvas, immediate pointer-move redraw, resize safety and visible red trace
overview_geometry_fix: single/double sparse groups show labels only; disconnected groups split; connected 100-li cells trace independent union boundaries
focus_logic: right click or Esc clears range/region focus, selected tile/object, object-focus dimming and stale classes while preserving camera position
import_policy: 安全补充模式可直接读取补充资料匹配与安全导入表.xlsx中的approved行；同时支持SHMAP_AUDIT_V1 Markdown。对象ID、母表行号、文件名和坐标不作为永久绑定依据。
markdown_compatibility: nine-section headings support ##/###/plain/bold forms, 01/1 numbering, Chinese or Western punctuation, blank-line-separated entry fields and category aliases; up to 300 files / 50MB per batch
object_hierarchy: any unique existing parent object may contain nested non-spatial child locations/segments; explicit create/bind/skip resolution in Markdown inspector; legacy v0.7.3 water segments remain readable
museum_display: 地块详细页按分类栏目布局：每行最多3个等宽分类，第4个分类自动换行；分类内部卡片纵向排列并使用滚轮，无横向卡片列
markdown_parser: v0.7.4 mixed-heading-punctuation-v2 + canonical-name alias binding + category-safe candidate filtering + section-07 original quote matching
startup_recovery: v0.7.4 database bootstrap timeout protection, local-cache read-only recovery, main-script retry, no automatic overwrite of SQLite during degraded startup
museum_interaction: detail-page categories remain expanded; empty categories are hidden; long lists scroll vertically; image preview and layered right-click return remain unchanged
scripture_pages: 18 full content pages with chapter navigation and right-click return; content links remain connected to object detail and map filtering
markdown_import: 审核表内嵌145份已审核Markdown；客户端先校验正文指纹，再按目标对象非空间语义字段指纹唯一匹配。0个或多个候选均阻止写入。
audit_binding: v0.7.5 direct XLSX audited import + semantic fingerprint binding + source body fingerprint verification
